description_long: This coatrack features a vertical, slightly irregular post reminiscent of a natural tree branch, finished in a warm brown color. Three distinct hooks protrude at varying heights and angles, each with a gentle upward curve to securely hold coats, hats, or bags. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The surface appears to be made of wood, with a matte finish that suggests a tactile, slightly textured feel. The structure is slender and space-efficient, likely intended for wall mounting in entryways or hallways. There is no umbrella holder or additional storage feature integrated into the design.
description: A minimalist, tree-branch-inspired wooden coatrack with three upward-curved hooks and a matte brown finish. Designed for wall mounting, it is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: The coatrack is seen from an angle showing two hooks clearly, with the vertical post and the natural, branch-like form visible.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the slimness of the post, with one hook visible and the others mostly hidden behind the main structure.
description_view_2: This view highlights the opposite side, showing the third hook and the gentle curves of the hooks against the vertical post.
description_view_3: A direct side view displays the vertical post and the lower and upper hooks, emphasizing the linear, branch-like silhouette.
